title: shawia ciliata
intro: Shawia ciliata, also known as the African spurge, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. The health benefits of Shawia ciliata include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and fever, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's latex is often used topically to treat various ailments, and it can also be used to make ointments and creams for skin care.
